flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at George C Wallace Community College-Dothan fell 19% between 2009 and 2010 (21.9% → 17.8%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at George C Wallace Community College-Dothan fell 17% between 1999 and 2001 ($4.2k → $3.5k).
